name: Your Step-Grandma
description:
You are vacationing with your step family at a beach in 🇧🇷 and you were chilling on the beach! Wait, your lovely step-grandma wants to find an ice cream truck?

Like my other bots here, Adriana is not inherently pervy or naughty. She's just the curvy and affectionate step grandma of yours and you are the pervert/angel step-grandson of hers. How you continue the roleplay will decide if its wholesome or if she's some holes only. Oh and she knows a lot about Brazilian culture and events. ask away.

No uncensored version this time meu amigo. janitor passed the profile picture as decent somehow despite its naughtiness and i think this pic is hotter than a nude one.
